project_name: Gotcha Los Patos La Marquesa - 3D Landing Page
archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro / Tactical) + Archetype 7 (Neon Accents)
emotional_tone: Adrenaline-pumping, tactical, rugged, immersive, extreme sports chaos.

anti_patterns: No Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
No soft, muddy shadows. Use sharp glowing borders instead.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for containers. Tactical Control Room Grid for packages and bento layout for testimonials.
spacing_and_layout.hero: 100vh absolute positioning for 3D canvas, z-10 for text content.
spacing_and_layout.sections: py-24 or py-32 for major sections.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid or glassmorphism borders. No border-radius larger than rounded-xl (keep it sharp/tactical).

three_d_strategy.scene_description: A dark, immersive scene with floating 3D spheres representing paintballs (neon green, orange, magenta) and subtle fog. The spheres should have a glossy/metallic material.
three_d_strategy.interactions: Mouse movement should trigger a repulsion force on the spheres (like dodging paint).
three_d_strategy.performance: Use instanced meshes for particles. Wrap Canvas in React Suspense. Fallback to CSS background if R3F fails.

navbar.style: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0D0A]/80 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
navbar.logo_instructions: Since image generation failed, build the logo using pure HTML/SVG: A neon green CSS rounded circle, inside place red text 'GOTCHA' over 'LOS PATOS', with an absolutely positioned magenta paint splatter SVG/icon and a Lucide user/crosshair icon to represent players.
navbar.actions: Language Toggle (ES/EN) and primary Book CTA.

hero.layout: Center aligned over 3D background. Heavy emphasis on H1. Subtle text shadow for readability.
hero.cta: Solid Neon Green (#39FF14) button, black text, font-black, hover:scale-105 transition-transform, glowing drop-shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)]

package_cards.style: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8.
package_cards.hover_effect: Framer motion 3D tilt or Y-translate (-translate-y-2). Border shifts to #39FF14 or #FF4500 on hover.
package_cards.content: Price prominently displayed (Anton font). Features list with Lucide CheckCircle in neon green.

booking_modal.style: Solid background (#141A14) for readability. Not glass. 1px solid border-white/20.
booking_modal.features: Amount total calculation, $300 MXN advance payment notice highlight (in blaze orange).

testimonials.style: Tactical dark cards with magenta/neon green quote icons. Heavy contrast.

floating_whatsapp.style: Neon green circle, glowing effect, bouncy entry animation.

footer.style: Darkest background (#050605), large 'GOTCHA LOS PATOS' outline text (text-transparent stroke-white/10) as texture.

media.placeholder_splatter: Use CSS radial-gradients or SVG paths with blur for paint splatters.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use Tailwind + Framer Motion + R3F.
Avoid Shadcn for the main marketing sections, use raw Tailwind for maximum creative freedom (glassmorphism, bento grids).
Use Shadcn dialog/form ONLY for the booking modal.
Implement the ES/EN translation toggle via a simple state context or dictionary object.
Build the Logo using HTML/Tailwind since image generation failed.
Apply data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards, toggles).
